comments: Third Birthday show with listeners' top ten tracks

Deep Purple: 'Child in Time' (LP - Deep Purple In Rock) (Harvest)
Led Zeppelin: 'Stairway to Heaven' (LP - Led Zeppelin IV) (Atlantic)
